_Posted by Invoke-AiDispatchQueue.ps1 (branch mode): a passed run is committed to its branch for human review; nothing is auto-pushed._

Audit content landed on `main` via PR #93 (merge commit `df8ec26`).

This dispatch is a **positive salvage outcome** — round 0 produced
the on-scope 5-question read-only audit cleanly; the verify gate
caught an unrelated `STATUS_ACCESS_VIOLATION` in `rge-gfx --lib`;
the scope-preserving halt clause (added in `27f6e1b` to task #4)
correctly refused the auto-routed CORRECTION expanding scope; the
halt was written as a NEEDS_HUMAN EXEC packet; and the audit
content + halt artifacts together became the canonical task #4
record.

**Landed on main as part of this PR:**
- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-92_TASK_2026-05-22_16-45-11+0300.md` (+ meta)
- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-92_EXEC_2026-05-22_16-52-05+0300.md` (+ meta) — the audit
- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-92_CORRECT_2026-05-22_16-56-14+0300.md` (+ meta) — auto-routed correction packet
- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-92_EXEC_2026-05-22_17-00-51+0300.md` (+ meta) — the NEEDS_HUMAN halt packet
- `ai_dispatch_logs/log_2026-05-22_17-01-46+0300.md` — queue audit log

**Separately on main:**
- `a533b48` — `chore(infra): serialize GPU/readback tests in rge-gfx --lib with test_lock::guard` (the unrelated rge-gfx --lib stabilization)
- `27f6e1b` — `chore(dispatch): add scope-preserving halt clause to task #4` (the halt clause that bounced the CORRECTION)

**Labels scrubbed:** `ai-dispatch-failed`, `ai-dispatch-retry`,
`ai-auto` removed. Issue retains `ai-dispatch-done` as historical
record of successful (via salvage) task #4 completion.

**Follow-up dispatch** identified by the audit (Q5): opt-in
`crates/io-gltf/src/asset_store_cache.rs` adapter forwarding through
`dyn rge_asset_store::Cache`. To be added to `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md`
as a new task entry after this issue closes.
